title: Pope Leo Warns of AI's Potential to Distort Humanity

charlotte_impact: Highlights ethical considerations needed as AI becomes more integrated into daily life and decision-making processes.

title: Trump Ties Abraham Accords to Any Iran Nuclear Agreement
